note: Approximate coordinates from open-source intelligence. Includes suspected sites.

data.name: Trident Submarine Base (Clyde)
data.notes: UK's entire nuclear arsenal. Vanguard SSBN. Continuously at Sea Deterrent.

data.name: AWE Aldermaston
data.notes: UK nuclear warhead design and production. Trident W76-1 equivalent.

data.name: Whiteman AFB (B-2 Base)
data.notes: B-2 Spirit stealth bombers. Nuclear gravity bombs B61-12.

data.name: Minot AFB (B-52 + ICBM)
data.notes: B-52H and Minuteman III ICBMs. North Dakota.

data.name: Malmstrom AFB (Minuteman)
data.notes: 150 Minuteman III ICBM silos in Montana.

data.name: Vandenberg (Minuteman)
data.notes: ICBM test launches. Space launch also. California.

data.name: King's Bay (SSBN)
data.notes: Ohio-class SSBN home port. D5 Trident II. East Coast deterrent.

data.name: Bangor (SSBN)
data.notes: Ohio-class SSBN. West Coast. Largest US deployed nuclear arsenal.

data.name: Pokhran Test Range
data.notes: India's nuclear test site. 1974 Smiling Buddha, 1998 Shakti tests.

data.name: Bhabha Atomic Research Centre
data.notes: India's primary nuclear research. CIRUS and Dhruva reactors. Trombay, Mumbai.

data.name: Rare Materials Plant Rattehalli
data.notes: India's gas centrifuge enrichment. HEU for naval reactors (INS Arihant).

data.name: Kaiga Nuclear Power (Research)
data.notes: PHWR reactors. Dual-use potential. Karnataka.

data.name: Missile Test Complex (Abdul Kalam)
data.notes: Wheeler Island. Agni ICBM/IRBM test site. All Agni variants tested here.

data.name: Lop Nor Test Site
data.notes: China's nuclear test site. 45 tests 1964-1996. May be preparing for new tests.

data.name: Jiuquan Satellite Launch (Dual)
data.notes: DF-31 test launches also. Primary space and ICBM test range.

data.name: Jilantai DF-41 Training Base
data.notes: DF-41 ICBM road-mobile operations training. Inner Mongolia.

data.name: Dimona (Negev Nuclear Research)
data.notes: Israel's nuclear weapons production. Plutonium. Officially unconfirmed program.

data.name: Yongbyon (DPRK)
data.notes: Primary DPRK nuclear complex. 5MW reactor, enrichment, reprocessing.

data.name: Punggye-ri (DPRK Test)
data.notes: Site of all 6 DPRK nuclear tests. New tunnels being excavated.

data.name: Natanz (Iran)
data.notes: Underground centrifuge enrichment. IR-6 centrifuges. 60% enrichment.

data.name: Fordow (Iran Underground)
data.notes: Mountain-buried enrichment. Near Qom. Hardened against airstrikes.

data.name: Seversk (Tomsk-7)
data.notes: Russia closed nuclear city. Plutonium production. Siberia.

data.name: Sarov (Arzamas-16)
data.notes: Russia's Los Alamos equivalent. VNIIEF nuclear weapons design lab.

data.name: Zhelenogorsk (Krasnoyarsk-26)
data.notes: Underground plutonium production. Siberia closed city.

data.name: Zheleznogorsk SSBN Pens
data.notes: Rock-cut submarine pens. Northern Fleet. SSBN berths.

data.name: Wanderobo (Pakistan Warhead Storage)
data.notes: Suspected Pakistani nuclear warhead storage near Wah Cantonment.

data.name: Wah Cantonment Ordnance
data.notes: Pakistan Ordnance Factories. Suspected warhead assembly.

data.name: Sargodha-Mushaf Underground
data.notes: Suspected underground F-16 nuclear storage tunnels near Sargodha AB.
